summary: Complete testing of P0-1, P0-2, and P1 features. All 47 backend tests pass. All UI features verified working via Playwright automation.

issues: Minor console warning: Missing Description for DialogContent (accessibility improvement)

P0-1_hidden_properties_in_admin.details: Admin shows all 20 properties including 3 hidden ones. Hidden properties show 'Masqué' badge with grey background. Stats show: 20 Total, 3 Masquées, 17 Visibles

P0-2_site_images_tabs.details: Site images tab has 4 sub-tabs: Accueil (6 images), Services (2 images), Contact (1 image), Propriétés (1 image). All page navigation works.

API_properties_include_hidden.details: GET /api/properties?include_hidden=true returns 20 properties. GET /api/properties returns 17 (only active). Difference of 3 hidden properties.

API_settings_images_new_keys.details: GET /api/settings/images returns all new keys: home_hero, home_category_*, home_concept, home_cta, services_hero, services_lifestyle, contact_hero, properties_hero

P1_booking_flow.details: Complete flow working: date selection, price calculation (450€ x 4 nights = 1800€), booking form fill, booking creation with 'Booking confirmed!' success message

booking_price_quote.details: Price quote shows correct calculation with 'Dates disponibles - Prix garanti' message. Non-Beds24 properties show warning about indicative prices.

booking_api_creation.details: POST /api/bookings creates booking successfully with booking_id returned

seed_data_creation: Demo data already initialized from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 and P1 features fully tested and working. API filters for hidden properties work correctly. Site images have new page-based organization with all expected keys. Booking flow is complete from date selection to confirmation. 47 pytest tests available in /app/backend/tests/ covering all features.
